description_full:
📍 Remote (Global) | 🕐 Posted 4 hours ago - May 16, 2026  

The company is looking for a Key Account Manager to manage and grow strategic client relationships in a remote capacity.  

📋 Responsibilities include:  
- Building and maintaining strong relationships with key accounts  
- Driving revenue growth and identifying expansion opportunities  
- Collaborating with internal teams to ensure client satisfaction and success  
- Monitoring account performance and addressing any issues proactively  

🔑 Requirements:  
- Proven experience in account management or sales, preferably in relevant industry  
- Excellent communication and negotiation skills  
- Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities  
- Ability to work independently in a remote environment  

💡 Perks & Benefits:  
- Competitive compensation package  
- Flexible remote work  
- Opportunities for professional growth  

📩 To apply: DM Firman H on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/firman-h-0800b7260 (Applications without proper introduction may not be reviewed).  

🔗 Original post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/firman-h-0800b7260_were-hiring-key-account-manager-remote-share-7460934546117525504-wIcB
